dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires 18-month lookback period. Mapped to sma_200 as closest available moving average approximation (200 trading days ≈ 10 months; 18 months would require custom 378-day MA not in allowed set). Monthly rebalance frequency converted to 21-day max hold period. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: long entries when price > MA, short entries when price < MA.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires 18-month lookback period. Mapped to sma_200 as closest available moving average approximation (200 trading days ≈ 10 months; 18 months would require custom 378-day MA not in allowed set). Monthly rebalance frequency converted to 21-day max hold period. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT: long entries when price > MA, short entries when price < MA.

source_rule_text: A trader should take long positions when price is above its moving average and short positions when price is below it, using a fixed lookback period to identify trend direction in futures markets.
